name: babys-v3
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with Admin Dashboard, Backend API, and Store Frontend

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run admin" "npm run backend" "npm run store"
scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:backend && npm run build:store
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd admin && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../store && npm install

author: Your Name
